# Pasireotide 相關新聞

---

<p class="key-answer" data-question="Pasireotide 有什麼相關新聞？">
<strong>Pasireotide</strong> 目前有 <strong>16 則</strong>相關新聞報導，預測適應症 20 個。
</p>

<div class="key-takeaway">
本頁整合 Pasireotide 的 AI 預測適應症與最新健康新聞，橘色標示的適應症表示近期有相關新聞報導。
</div>

<div class="drug-info-card">
<strong>藥物資訊</strong>
<ul>
<li><strong>原適應症</strong>：Signifor is indicated for the treatment of adult patients with Cushing’s disease for whom surgery is not an option or for whom surgery has failed. Signifor is indicated for the treatment of adult...</li>
<li><strong>證據等級</strong>：L5</li>
<li><strong>預測適應症</strong>（20 個）：<ul>
<li>adrenal gland hyperfunction（96.8%）</li>
<li>nephrogenic syndrome of inappropriate antidiuresis（96.1%）</li>
<li>Ambras type hypertrichosis universalis congenita（93.8%）</li>
<li>malformation syndrome with odontal and/or periodontal component（93.6%）</li>
<li>syndrome with a Dandy-Walker malformation as major feature（93.2%）</li>
<li>hypertrichosis (disease)（93.2%）</li>
<li>carbamoyl phosphate synthetase I deficiency disease（92.9%）</li>
<li>isolated genetic hair shaft abnormality（92.8%）</li>
<li>hyperargininemia（89.8%）</li>
<li>tinea nigra（89.7%）</li>
<li>duodenal obstruction（89.0%）</li>
<li>duodenogastric reflux（86.4%）</li>
<li>duodenal ulcer (disease)（84.3%）</li>
<li>cranioectodermal dysplasia（79.2%）</li>
<li>RHYNS syndrome（78.9%）</li>
<li>renal tubule disease（77.2%）</li>
<li>Senior-Boichis syndrome（77.2%）</li>
<li>candidiasis（76.2%）</li>
<li>nephrogenic diabetes insipidus（75.7%）</li>
<li>epulis（75.6%）</li>
</ul></li>
</ul>
<p><a href="{{ '/drugs/pasireotide/' | relative_url }}">查看完整藥物報告 →</a></p>
</div>
